description_long: This kiosk features a tall, vertical black panel mounted on a hexagonal wooden base, giving it a modern and sleek appearance. The panel displays printed signage on each of its three visible faces, with geometric logo accents and text in Portuguese, such as 'Seja Bem Vindo' and office information. The base is made of wood with a visible grain pattern, providing stability and a warm contrast to the dark panel. The signage is framed and integrated into the upper section of the panel, while the lower section is decorated with geometric white designs. The kiosk is compact and designed for information display, suitable for placement in lobbies, sidewalks, or public spaces. There are no visible doors, windows, or interactive mechanical parts beyond the signage.
description: A modern, vertical black information kiosk with geometric signage panels and a hexagonal wooden base. It features printed signs and decorative white geometric accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing a black panel with a framed printed sign labeled 'Oficinas' and geometric white designs on a wooden hexagonal base.
description_view_1: This view displays the panel with a 'Seja Bem Vindo' welcome sign and the same geometric accents, emphasizing the kiosk's main informational face.
description_view_2: Side view showing a different printed sign with hours of operation and the geometric accents, highlighting the multi-sided display capability.
description_view_3: Angled view revealing two signage panels at once, emphasizing the kiosk's triangular display structure and the continuity of the geometric design.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs integrated into the upper section of each panel, featuring text and geometric logos; visible text includes 'Seja Bem Vindo', 'Oficinas', and hours of operation.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top, no overhangs or decorative roof elements, matching the vertical panel design.
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with geometric decorative influences
